judge.reason: Primary purpose is to probe an ACPI button device: allocate and initialize button and input structures, set up input capabilities, install handlers, and register the input device. Refcount operations (input_allocate_device/input_free_device) are incidental to memory management and error handling, not the function's core purpose.
